texts.label: text
texts.orig: By securing a reservation at Pearl Mara Luxury Tented Lodge, you hereby consent to the terms and conditions stipulated herein.
texts.text: By securing a reservation at Pearl Mara Luxury Tented Lodge, you hereby consent to the terms and conditions stipulated herein.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: To  initiate  a  new  booking,  kindly  direct  your  request  to  reservations@pearlmara.com.  Upon receiving  your  inquiry,  your  reservation  will  be  provisionally  held  for  a  period  of  5  working reservation summary. Extensions may be granted for up to two additional periods upon request.
texts.text: To  initiate  a  new  booking,  kindly  direct  your  request  to  reservations@pearlmara.com.  Upon receiving  your  inquiry,  your  reservation  will  be  provisionally  held  for  a  period  of  5  working reservation summary. Extensions may be granted for up to two additional periods upon request.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All cancellations must be submitted in writing and will be considered effective upon receipt of
texts.text: All cancellations must be submitted in writing and will be considered effective upon receipt of

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Cancellations made 45 days or more before arrival: Forfeit of 20% deposit and bank charges.
texts.text: Cancellations made 45 days or more before arrival: Forfeit of 20% deposit and bank charges.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Cancellations made between 45 and 30 days before arrival: Forfeit of 50% of the total booking cost.
texts.text: Cancellations made between 45 and 30 days before arrival: Forfeit of 50% of the total booking cost.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Cancellations made less than 30 days before arrival and no-shows: Forfeit of 100% of the total booking cost.
texts.text: Cancellations made less than 30 days before arrival and no-shows: Forfeit of 100% of the total booking cost.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: It is recomended for all guests of Pearl Mara Luxury Tented Lodge to possess comprehensive travel and medical insurance. This should cover potential cancellations, medical expenses, loss or damage of personal belongings, and money. Additionally, we recomend guests to secure AMR Flying Doctors coverage for emergency evacuations.
texts.text: It is recomended for all guests of Pearl Mara Luxury Tented Lodge to possess comprehensive travel and medical insurance. This should cover potential cancellations, medical expenses, loss or damage of personal belongings, and money. Additionally, we recomend guests to secure AMR Flying Doctors coverage for emergency evacuations.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Pearl Mara Luxury Tented Lodge reserves the right to adjust contract rates in the event of changes to conservation fees, government taxes, training levies, or service charges, with immediate effect and without prior notice. Transportation costs quoted by third-party service
